kolu
Blog GitHub ↗

the atlas

The garden.

kolu's in-repo knowledge base — authored in markdown, rendered here. This index is generated from each note's frontmatter, so there is no hand-curated map to drift and nothing can fall through unfiled.

design

  • The kolu Atlas

    budding proposed

    kolu's second brain as an in-repo, markdown-authored knowledge garden — rendered by Astro, dogfooded in the Code tab.

colophon

Named after கோலு, the South Indian tradition of arranging figures on tiered steps.
